title: RunSnapshot
description: Output of `pilot.tools.observe snapshot`. A point-in-time view of a training run derived from (a) `submit.status()` for process state and (b) tailing `train.log` for iteration/loss/symptom signals. Persisted at `state/runs/<run_id>/snapshots/<ts>.yaml` and is the primary artifact downstream stages (SMOKE, SCAN_PARALLEL, DIAGNOSE) consume.

snapshot_at.description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was produced.

status.description: Effective status. `hung` is observe-only: derived when process is alive but no new iter line has appeared for `symptoms.hang_threshold_s`. All other values mirror RunHandle.status.

alive.description: True iff pid is in proc table AND not zombie.

current_iter.description: Highest iteration number seen in the log so far.

total_iters.description: Target iteration count (from Megatron `iteration N/M` log).

iters_per_min.description: Rolling average over the last few iterations (window=5).

last_iter_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent iter line (parsed from Megatron's leading `[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.ffffff]`).

silent_for_s.description: Seconds between last_iter_at and snapshot_at. Null until the first iter line appears.

history.description: Per-iter time series (parallel arrays). Capped at the last 50 iters by default to keep snapshots small.

loss_finite.description: False if any parsed loss was NaN/Inf.

nccl_error.description: True iff log matches NCCL/RCCL error or watchdog timeout.

cuda_error.description: True iff log matches CUDA/HIP runtime error.

python_error.description: True iff log contains a Python Traceback / unhandled Exception (excluding warnings).

evidence.description: Up to 16 most-recent matching lines, with classification. Used by DIAGNOSE / for human review.

lines.description: Total line count seen by this snapshot.

tailed_bytes.description: How many bytes of the tail were actually parsed (capped to keep snapshots cheap).

recommendation.description: What observe thinks the orchestrator should do next. Advisory only; the agent makes the final call.
